title: AkcliSimSpec
description: sim.json: stimuli/analyses for akcli sim, plus .meas-backed pass/fail assertions. Mirrors validation in altium_kicad_cli.sim.assertions.load().

name.description: Stimulus identifier; becomes the SPICE element name, so it must be a bare identifier and unique across stimuli.

analyses.description: ngspice analysis name (tran|ac|op|dc|...) -> its argument text, e.g. {"tran": "5u 100m", "ac": "dec 40 10 100k"}.

options.description: Deck/engine tuning. Open-ended; 'rshunt' is validated by altium_kicad_cli.sim.assertions.load().

rshunt.description: Floating-node fix. Absent or 'auto': add '.option rshunt=1e12' only when a floating node is detected. false: never. A number or non-'auto' string (e.g. '1e12', '1G'): always emit that value.

numOrEng.description: A number, or an engineering-notation string (4.7k, 100n, 2M2, 25m, 1e-7, ...).

assert.description: One .meas-backed pass/fail check. Carries at least one bound: either a single 'approx', or a window — up to one lower (gt|ge) AND up to one upper (lt|le) bound.

meas.description: Verbatim text after 'meas <analysis> <name>', e.g. 'MAX v(peak) from=20m to=60m'.

when.description: Shorthand for a WHEN measurement, e.g. 'v(peak)=0.297 RISE=1' (emitted as 'meas <analysis> <name> WHEN <when>').

analysis.description: Overrides the inferred analysis; must be a key of 'analyses'.

gt.description: Lower bound: value must be strictly greater.

lt.description: Upper bound: value must be strictly less.

approx.description: Two-sided ~equality; cannot be combined with gt/ge/lt/le.

tol.description: Relative tolerance for 'approx' (default 0.05 = 5%). Only valid together with 'approx'.
